sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111456" key="filorrw/c" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-ρρώξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥώξ </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">Β</etym>)<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, ῥάξ</foreign>) <sense id="n111456.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving grapes,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄμπελος</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.22</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simm.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
